other_findings.finding: Visium spatial deconvolution showed correlation between pre-dermal condensate and LTi/ILC3 cell type abundances across skin-covered spots
LTi and ILC3 cells were predicted to interact with pre-Dc cells through CXCL12-CXCR4 and CXCL12-DPP4 ligand-receptor pairs

evidence_quotes.quote: pre-dermal condensate (pre-Dc) cells co-located with dendritic and lymphoid cells based on correlation analyses
evidence_quotes.context: Gopee et al. 2024, Single-cell atlas section

evidence_quotes.quote: Notably, lymphoid tissue inducer and ILC3 cells were also predicted to co-locate and interact with pre-Dc cells through ligand-receptor signals implicated in the regulation of cellular adhesion and migration (CXCL12-CXCR4 and CXCL12-DPP4)
evidence_quotes.context: Gopee et al. 2024, HF mesenchymal differentiation section
